commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f883a52e4ae8277c05b14af6fa49032251ea82b3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `PluginHookHandlerMap` and `PluginHookName` type re-exports to the public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/plugin-entry` entrypoint.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a public type-export request rather than a runtime bug. Source inspection confirms the internal types exist and current `plugin-entry` does not re-export them by name.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the remaining blocker is public Plugin SDK contract acceptance plus contributor-owned real behavior proof, not only a mechanical code repair.

target.title: feat(plugin-sdk): re-export PluginHookHandlerMap and PluginHookName from plugin-entry
target.author: rgao-coreweave

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
